subject: Re: Follow up on possible meeting with Jeffrey Epstein
body:
yes

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, April 9, 2007 10:52:13 AM
Subject: FW: Follow up on possible meeting with Jeffrey Epstein


What should I tell her?





Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Rachel A. Jonte [mailto:jonte@nsi.edu] 
Sent: Thursday, April 05, 2007 4:23 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Follow up on possible meeting with Jeffrey Epstein

Dear Lesley,

Hi there!  I just wanted to follow up on our conversation last week and
find out if Jeffrey will be able to meet with me sometime on May 1, 2,
or 3?  Dr.
Edelman thought it would be very valuable for the Institute if I could
speak with him and get his thoughts on some of our strategies for
sustaining the Institute.

Please let me know.

Thanks so much!

Rachel

Rachel A. Jonte
Director, Institute Relations
The Neurosciences Institute
10640 John Jay Hopkins Drive
San Diego, California  92121
(858) 626-2018 direct
(858) 626-2013 facsimile
jonte@nsi.edu
www.nsi.edu


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
